title: The Mating Season
writer: Charles Brackett, Walter Reisch, Richard L. Breen
actors: Gene Tierney, John Lund, Miriam Hopkins
plot: Ellen McNulty loses her hamburger joint and goes to see her son, who marries a socialite at the same time. Due to her modest background and a case of mistaken identity, Ellen poses as the newlyweds' cook.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 2 wins & 2 nominations total
